api_id.description: Identifier of the API Gateway V2 API to which the route belongs.

api_key_required.description: Indicates whether an API key is required for the route. Must be set to true if the route is intended to enforce API key usage.

authorization_scopes.description: Defines the OAuth scopes required for API route authorization, applicable only when using OAuth 2.0 authorization.

authorization_type.description: Defines the type of authorization used for the route, such as NONE, AWS_IAM, or CUSTOM.

authorizer_id.description: Specifies the ID of the authorizer to be associated with the route, required if the route requires authorization.

model_selection_expression.description: Specifies the selection expression for identifying a model for incoming request data, required for routes with request models.

operation_name.description: Defines the name of the operation associated with the API Gateway route; required for uniquely identifying the route's functionality.

request_models.description: Specifies the mapping of request models for the route, where the key is the content type, and the value is the model's name.

request_parameter.description: Specifies the key-value mapping of request parameters to be passed to the integration, requiring valid keys and values to match the integration's configuration.

route_key.description: Defines the unique key for the route, typically combining the HTTP method and resource path, required for routing API requests.

route_response_selection_expression.description: Defines the selection expression used to choose a route response for an API Gateway route; must be a valid expression based on request data.

target.description: Specifies the integration target for the route, such as an AWS service or Lambda function ARN.
